ques: Find the Customer Service on the Booking website, browse the questions about cancellation, and tell me 'how do I know whether my booking has been cancelled'.
answer: After you cancel a booking with Booking.com, you should receive an email confirming the cancellation. Check your inbox and your spam/junk mail folders. If you don't get the confirmation email within 24 hours, contact the property directly to confirm they received your cancellation.
